appearancePrompt: CEO of Moebius , a multinational tech company
backstory: CEO of Moebius , a multinational tech company
history:
Before the heavens suffocated under a permanent blanket of soot, Zach  was defined by a different life. Built on the legacy of CEO of Moebius , a multinational tech company , they participated in the shimmering final years of the 20th century, before the sky darkened and the world dissolved.

The end did not arrive with a scream, but with the silent, creeping advance of the Great Fog. Zach  witnessed the terrifying transition as the horizon vanished and the sun became a pale, dying ember. They navigated the frantic desperation of the era, where the last vestiges of sovereignty were traded for drops of fuel.

When the surface finally became uninhabitable, the migration into the deep began. Zach  lived through the agonizing silence of the underground vaults, surviving for years behind reinforced structural shells as the world they remembered slowly turned to dust.

Emerging from the vaults, Zach  found a planet that no longer recognized its masters. They became a scavenger of the wastes, reclaiming artifacts of the past to build the foundations of a new, fractured society, proving to be a vital component in the machinery of reclamation.

Today, as a specialized Wanderer, Zach  has finally stabilized their position within the rising City-States. Their life is no longer about remembering the blue skies of the Old World, but about mastering the gray horizons of the Ash-Trail. Each step is a testament to a spirit for whom the Ash has finally become home.
name: Zach

occupation.description: Oversaw multi-team operations: construction projects, defense coordination, and resource extraction. Sees the big picture and keeps everyone aligned.
occupation.name: Operations Manager
perks: Crew efficiency bonus on group tasks

skills.description: A quick melee strike with a blade.
skills.name: Slash

skills.description: Push an enemy back and potentially cause shock damage.
skills.name: Shove

skills.description: Protect an ally for 1 turn. You tank damage redirected to them with reductions based on your Endurance vs Incoming Damage.
skills.name: Defend

skills.description: Become invisible to enemies. Any damage taken will reveal you. Duration increases with Wisdom.
skills.name: Hide

skills.description: Bother the enemy with your charisma, reducing their MP based on your Charisma vs target Wisdom.
skills.name: Distract

skills.description: Find weaknesses in the target, increasing critical chance for all attackers based on your Intelligence. (Max difference: 5 levels)
skills.name: Analyze

title: Radiation Prophet

traits.description: Remains calm under pressure. Party morale drops 30% slower during emergencies.
traits.name: Crisis Manager

traits.description: Trusts no one. Crew Trust decays slowly over time.
traits.name: Paranoid

traits.description: Nothing is truly broken. Destroyed equipment yields extra parts.
traits.name: Salvage Engineer

traits.description: Old fractures never healed. Takes extra damage from falls and impacts.
traits.name: Brittle Bones

traits.description: Knows where to dig. Containers have a small chance to yield rare materials.
traits.name: Scavenger's Instinct

traits.description: Utility above all. +5% Trade efficiency, -1 Charisma.
traits.name: Cold Pragmatist

traits.description: Plans better alone. Tactical bonuses when separated from crew.
traits.name: Lone Strategist

traits.description: Obsessed with Old World tech. Special POIs appear more often.
traits.name: Relic Seeker
